content.en:
Ye Tian continued to retreat and cultivate, improving his will rule realm.

Finally, on this day, his Will Rule Realm was elevated to the extreme of the Realm Legendary Lord.

If he wants to be promoted again, he must let the Will Rule Realm transform and be promoted to the Will Rule Realm, which is also one of the two necessary conditions to attack the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm.

Impacting the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules has little to do with controlling time, so Ye Tian can't easily transform the Domain of Will Rules.

Therefore, he still needs to rely on some chance

And the True Absence Holy Land gave every member who had cultivated to the extreme of the Realm Realm Legendary Lord a chance, and Ye Tian could also get such an opportunity.

So, he immediately applied to the True Nothing Holy Land for an opportunity.

Soon.

The Holy Land agreed.

"Endless Lord, you can enter the Sycamore Cave Heavenly Realm, a place of chance controlled by the True Saintless Land. "

Lord Wumeng came to inform Ye Tian.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.

The Wutong Cave Heavenly Realm is a treasure land of the True Immortal Land, which helps the Legendary Lord of the Realm Realm to comprehend the Heaven and Earth of the Will Rules.

Of course, it is not necessary to make the Will Rule Realm transform into a Will Rule Heaven, but anyone who enters the Wu 133 Tongdong Heavenly Realm Realm Legendary Lord basically has a 10% chance of achieving a breakthrough.

The probability of one percent may not be high, but for many realm realm legendary lords, this is already a high chance.

The Wutong Cave Heavenly Realm is located in the Infinite Sea, where three half-step Legendary Realm Lords are in charge, of course, by clones, even if they are invaded, the loss will not be too great.

At this moment, Ye Tian's application was approved, he didn't need any vouchers, he could directly enter the Wutong Cave Heavenly Realm, and the three half-step Legendary Realm Lords would not stop Ye Tian.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Wutong Cave Heavenly Realm of the Infinite Sea, where three ancient temples floated in the void of the huge fiery red space gate, and the clones of the three half-step Legendary Realm Lords sat here.

Almost all of them are rotated here, but none of the three half-step Legendary Realm Lords will be missing.

This also shows the importance of the Wutong Cave Heavenly Realm to the True Saintless Land, after all, for infinite years, there will also be many Legendary Lords who have comprehended the rules of the will and the Heaven and Earth here, and most of them have finally become Legendary Lords of the Transcendence Realm.

Without this treasure land, the number of Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords in the True Saintless Land would be much smaller.

Ye Tian passed through the entrance gate of the Wutong Cave Heavenly Realm and entered the Wutong Cave Heavenly Realm.

The entire Wutong Cave Heavenly Realm was a fiery red earth and void, and at this time, there were about eighteen Realm Legendary Lords here to participate in the cultivation of enlightenment.

But the longer the cultivation time, if there is no breakthrough, it is almost impossible to break through in the future, so if you can't break through, the realm realm legend lord will also leave here and won't stay here for too long.

The reason why the Cave Heaven Realm was able to help the Realm Realm Legendary Lord comprehend the Will Rule Heaven and Earth was because of the Sycamore Fire Spirit Tree.

The Sycamore Fire Spirit Tree is a very special sacred tree, located in the endless space-time layer, similar to the eternal treasure, an untouchable existence.

However, the Sycamore Fire Spirit Tree will drop a Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf every other eternal years, and this Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf cannot exist for too long, but it can allow people's will and rules to perfectly merge and create a kind of rule heaven and earth.

Therefore, when the Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf fell, one of the legendary lords of the ultimate realm realm could use the Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf to comprehend and cultivate, so as to comprehend the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules.

An eternal year, and there are not too many Legendary Lords who can reach the extreme of the Realm Realm, so it is enough for the Realm Legendary Lords to distribute.

Basically, if a Legendary Lord has not yet comprehended 1,000 tablets, the possibility of enlightenment is not too great.

Of course, many realm realm legendary lords will wait tirelessly, and they will choose to give up only when they have not broken through to 10,000 pieces.

At this time, there were only nineteen Realm Realm Extreme Legendary Lords here, so if they were allocated, nineteen Eternal Years, Ye Tian would be enough to allocate a Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf, and other Realm Realm Legendary Lords would not snatch it from Ye Tian.

Of course, without the help of the Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf, the Sycamore Fire Spirit Tree also has a similar effect, but the effect is much worse.

In the void around the Sycamore Fire Spirit Tree, Ye Tian came here and began to silently comprehend, waiting for the arrival of the Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf that belonged to him.

"Endless Lord, you're here, let's discuss, how many sycamore fire spirit leaves belong to you?"

"I've already comprehended a lot of Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaves, so I'm not in a hurry for the time being. "

"I'm not in a hurry for the time being, it's okay to let the Endless Lord understand first. "

After some discussion, from now on, the ninth Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf will return to Ye Tian.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.

In the blink of an eye, nine eternal years have passed.

this day.

Another sycamore fire spirit leaf floated out from the sycamore fire spirit tree.

"Lord Endless, it's your turn. "

The legendary lord of the extreme realm of other realms said.

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately took this piece of Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf over, fusing his own will and rules into it.

Rumble!!!!

The two began to merge, transforming from the realm of will rules to the world of will rules.

At the same time, Ye Tian was also assisting in his comprehension with the help of the treasure obtained by the Gray Mist Stone Statue, because that Xingzhang treasure also had the evolution of the Will Rule Heaven and Earth, but that treasure map only revealed the process of promotion from the Will Rule Realm to the Will Rule Heaven and Earth, not using Ye Tian's own will and rules.

But if the two are combined, it will be too helpful to Ye Tian.

Unconsciously, this piece of Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf ran out of power.

But still, Ye Tian had already touched the threshold of the Heaven and Earth of the Rule of Will.

"If there are a few more sycamore fire spirit leaves, I will definitely be able to break through!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

In this way, Ye Tian comprehended the Sycamore Fire Spirit Tree while contemplating the mysterious treasure map, and silently waited for his own piece of the Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf.

After more than a dozen eternal years had passed, Ye Tian had obtained another Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf, and once again used it to comprehend the Will Rule Heaven and Earth.

Gradually, dozens of eternal years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian began to comprehend his fifth Sycamore Fire Spirit Leaf.

Halfway through his enlightenment, Ye Tian's perception accumulated to the extreme, triggering a qualitative change.

Rumble!!!

The realm of will rules has begun to transform into the world of will rules!

And this scene completely stunned those legendary lords who were at the extreme of the realm. _
